title: Account settings

publicProfile.description: This name belongs to your account and is shown as the author on every culture you have published, or will publish, to the public culture library.
publicProfile.helperText: Without a name, your publications appear anonymous. If you set a name later, it automatically appears as the author on all cultures you already published – if you remove it again, those cultures appear anonymous once more. The name must be unique and not already used by someone else.

deleteDescription: If you delete your account, it is deactivated immediately and anonymized after 14 days. Projects without remaining members are then deleted including project data; published public library entries remain.
restoreDescription: You can undo the deletion within this period.
dialogWarning: Please confirm with your current password and the text "{{phrase}}". Your account will be deactivated and anonymized after 14 days. Projects without remaining members are then deleted.
deletionScheduled: Your account has been scheduled for deletion. It will be anonymized on {{date}}.

errors.generic: The action could not be performed.

unsavedChangesWarning: There are unsaved changes. They will be lost when you leave the page.

emailConfirm.title: Confirm email change
emailConfirm.invalid: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired.

developer.title: Developer
developer.hintsDescription: Reset local development hints or show the first-project onboarding again. This does not delete projects or account data.
